title: Roadmap — Sword x Staff
intro: Ruta de progresión día a día desde la ventana de lanzamiento (Verdantglade) hasta el desbloqueo de la Temporada 5 (Hapadi). 4 temporadas · 6 cambios de trabajo · 350M de muro de poder final. Las fechas están en horario del servidor (Asia, GMT+7). Las fechas pasadas son reales; las futuras son estimaciones marcadas con ~.
label: Roadmap
description: Progresión día a día de las 4 temporadas (215 días mapeados)

items.title: Bloque ENDGAME ROADMAP
items.content:
A day-by-day progression route from the Verdantglade launch window to the Season 5 Hapadi unlock, compiled by EOG analysts and laid out on a visual timeline by Eden of Gaming. Every region gate, dungeon power wall, job change, and reward window is plotted below. Use the filters to isolate just the dungeons you need to out-gear, or the treasure windows you can't afford to miss. Power values are placeholders pending live-server confirmation.
Dates count from the global launch on May 19, 2026 in server time (Asia, GMT+7). Past days are actual; upcoming dates are estimates (marked with ~) projected from the cadence and can shift with patches, maintenance, or schedule changes. The daily reset is 8:00 PM (GMT+7), which is 6:00 AM PT / 9:00 AM ET the same calendar day for North American players, so each date below holds in both regions.
